text.title: Supabase MVP Stack Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Supabase MVP Stack end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: audit-rls-state
step.action: Run rls-audit.sql; list tables with RLS off.
step.decision-gate: Reject any table with RLS off.

step.name: review-policies
step.action: Replace permissive policies with auth.uid() / role-scoped policies; test as anon vs authenticated.

step.name: enforce-migrations
step.action: All schema changes via `supabase migration new`; commit to repo; ban dashboard edits in policy.

step.name: review-buckets
step.action: For each bucket set private=true unless justified; public reads via signed URLs.

step.name: review-realtime
step.action: Per-channel payload review; drop PII columns from public channels; document.
